app.name: VisaFlow
app.tagline: Visa application dossier and document checklist manager

footer.disclaimer: VisaFlow is an organizational tool. It does not provide legal advice, represent any embassy or visa center, or guarantee a visa decision. Always verify requirements using current official sources.

privacy.title: Your data never leaves this browser
privacy.body: Everything stays in memory only — nothing is sent to a server and nothing is written to disk. Export your dossier to save your progress before closing the tab.
privacy.memoryOnly: Imported data stays in browser memory only. Export again to save any changes you make.

importDialog.title: Import data
importDialog.description: Load a dossier from a JSON file you exported earlier.

noDossier.title: No application loaded
noDossier.description: Start a new application or import an existing dossier to continue.
noDossier.descriptionFor: Start a new application or import an existing dossier to work on {{section}}.

sources.heading: Source
sources.unverifiedNotice: This requirement has not yet been verified against a current official source. Check the authorized institution's current document list before applying.
sources.notLegalGuarantee: Review status describes how recently this template was checked by a maintainer. It is not a legal guarantee and VisaFlow is not an embassy or authorized visa centre.
